meta.convention: delta = radius (ABF). Line f + gamma*g, gamma over all of F. EXACT distance via full codeword enumeration; S* exact branch-and-bound. delta_design = capacity - 2/s.
meta.construction: f=X^{rm}, g=X^{(r-1)m} on D=<omega> (order n); H=<xi> order s; k=(r-2)m; predicted close scalars = H^{(+r)} (distinct-element r-fold sumset of H).
